data.name: AccessibilityChecker_CloseHelpText
data.value: Close the Accessibility Checker without navigating to an issue.

data.name: AccessibilityChecker_GoToHelpText
data.value: Navigate to the selected accessibility issue.

data.name: AccessibilityChecker_IssueListHelpText
data.value: Select an accessibility issue and choose Go To to navigate to its workbook location.

data.name: AccessibilityChecker_ResultHelpText
data.value: Summarizes the workbook accessibility check when no issues are found.

data.name: AddWatch_AddHelpText
data.value: Add the selected cells to the Watch Window.

data.name: AddWatch_BodyText
data.value: The selected cells will be added to the Watch Window.

data.name: AddWatch_CancelHelpText
data.value: Close the Add Watch dialog without adding cells.

data.name: AddWatch_SelectedRangeHelpText
data.value: Shows the selected worksheet cells that will be watched.

data.name: AllowEditRange_ClearAllHelpText
data.value: Delete all editable ranges for this worksheet.

data.name: AllowEditRange_ExampleText
data.value: Use an A1-style range, for example A1:C10.

data.name: AllowEditRange_ExistingRangesHelpText
data.value: Select an existing editable range to delete.

data.name: AllowEditRange_IntroText
data.value: Specify a worksheet range that can be edited while the sheet is protected.

data.name: AllowEditRange_PickerHelpText
data.value: Collapse dialog and select the editable range from the worksheet.

data.name: AllowEditRange_PickerToolTip
data.value: Collapse dialog and select editable range

data.name: AllowEditRange_RangeHelpText
data.value: Enter the worksheet range that users can edit while the sheet is protected.

data.name: CreateNamesFromSelection_BodyText
data.value: Excel creates named ranges from the selected row or column labels.

data.name: CreateNamesFromSelection_BottomRowHelpText
data.value: Use the bottom row of the selection as names.

data.name: CreateNamesFromSelection_GroupHelpText
data.value: Choose which row or column labels Excel uses to create named ranges.

data.name: CreateNamesFromSelection_IntroText
data.value: Create names from values in the:

data.name: CreateNamesFromSelection_LeftColumnHelpText
data.value: Use the left column of the selection as names.

data.name: CreateNamesFromSelection_NoSelectionMessage
data.value: Select at least one row or column label position.

data.name: CreateNamesFromSelection_RightColumnHelpText
data.value: Use the right column of the selection as names.

data.name: CreateNamesFromSelection_TopRowHelpText
data.value: Use the top row of the selection as names.

data.name: CreateTable_MinimumRowsMessage
data.value: Table range must include at least two rows.

data.name: CreateTable_RangeLabel
data.value: _Where is the data for your table?

data.name: CustomViewName_HiddenFilterSettingsAutomationName
data.value: Hidden rows, columns and filter settings

data.name: CustomViewName_HiddenFilterSettingsHelpText
data.value: Include hidden rows, hidden columns, and filter settings in the custom view.

data.name: CustomViewName_NameHelpText
data.value: Enter the name for the custom workbook view.

data.name: CustomViewName_PrintSettingsHelpText
data.value: Include print settings in the custom view.

data.name: DataTable_ColumnInputInsideRangeMessage
data.value: Column input cell cannot be inside the data table range.

data.name: DataTable_InvalidColumnInputMessage
data.value: Enter a valid column input cell.

data.name: DataTable_InvalidRowInputMessage
data.value: Enter a valid row input cell.

data.name: DataTable_MissingInputMessage
data.value: Enter either a row input cell or a column input cell.

data.name: DataTable_RowInputInsideRangeMessage
data.value: Row input cell cannot be inside the data table range.

data.name: DataTable_SameInputCellMessage
data.value: Row and column input cells must be different.

data.name: ErrorChecking_ActionIntroText
data.value: Choose an action for the selected issue.

data.name: ErrorChecking_NoSelectionHelpBody
data.value: Select an issue to see its description and available correction actions.

data.name: ErrorChecking_SelectedIssueHelpBody
EvaluateFormula_HelpBody
data.value: Evaluate Formula shows the selected formula one calculation step at a time. Use Evaluate to advance, Step In when a nested formula can be inspected, Step Out to return to the previous step, and Restart to begin again.

data.name: FillSeriesStep_InvalidStopMessage
data.value: Enter a numeric stop value or leave it blank.

data.name: FillSeriesStep_StepValueHelpText
data.value: Enter the amount to increment each value in the series.

data.name: FillSeriesStep_StopValueHelpText
data.value: Enter the optional final value for the series.

data.name: ForecastSheet_InvalidPeriodsMessage
data.value: Enter a positive whole number of forecast periods.

data.name: ForecastSheet_PeriodsHelpText
data.value: Enter the positive whole number of periods to forecast.

data.name: FunctionArguments_DefaultArgumentDescription
data.value: The first value, reference, or expression.

data.name: FunctionArguments_FormulaResultHelpText
data.value: Shows the formula that will be inserted from the current argument values.

data.name: Backstage_Recent_PinHelpText
data.value: Keep this workbook in the pinned files list.

data.name: Backstage_Recent_RemoveAutomationHelpText
data.value: Remove this workbook from the recent files list without deleting it.

data.name: Backstage_Recent_UnpinHelpText
data.value: Remove this workbook from the pinned files list.

data.name: Export_BitmapTextWhenFontsMayNotBeEmbedded
data.value: bitmap text when fonts may not be embedded

data.name: Export_InitialViewTwoColumnLeft
data.value: opens as two columns with odd pages left

data.name: Export_InitialViewTwoColumnRight
data.value: opens as two columns with odd pages right

data.name: Export_InvalidPdfLanguage
data.value: Enter a valid PDF language tag, for example {0}.

data.name: Export_PageRangeEndsAfterLastPage
data.value: Page range ends after the last exportable page ({0}).

data.name: Export_PageRangeFromLessThanToError
data.value: From page must be less than or equal to To page.

data.name: Export_PageRangePositiveError
data.value: Page numbers must be 1 or greater.

data.name: Export_PageRangeStartsAfterLastPage
data.value: Page range starts after the last exportable page ({0}).

data.name: Export_PageRangeWholeNumbersError
data.value: Page range must include whole-number From and To values.

data.name: Export_PdfAPdfOnlyUnsupported
data.value: PDF/A compliance is PDF-only and not supported

data.name: Export_PdfAUnsupportedError
data.value: PDF/A compliance is not supported by the current PDF exporter.

data.name: Export_PdfFallbackMessage
data.value: PDF export uses FreeX's print renderer. XPS export remains available for Windows print-pipeline workflows.

data.name: Export_TaggedPdfNotSupported
data.value: tagged PDF structure is not supported

data.name: Export_TaggedPdfPdfOnlyUnsupported
data.value: tagged PDF structure is PDF-only and not supported

data.name: Export_TaggedPdfUnsupportedError
data.value: Tagged PDF structure is not supported by the current PDF exporter.

data.name: DeferredCommand_AutoCorrectOptions_Body
data.value: AutoCorrect replacement dictionaries are not implemented in FreeX. Proofing options shown here are informational until a local spelling and replacement dictionary model exists.

data.name: DeferredCommand_EditingLanguages_Body
data.value: Editing language installation and Office language packs are not implemented in FreeX. FreeX uses the local app culture and workbook content as-is.

data.name: DeferredCommand_LocalAccount_Body
data.value: Microsoft account integration is not implemented in FreeX. Workbooks are local files; use Options for local app settings and your normal file-system workflow for identity, storage, and sharing.

data.name: DeferredCommand_MultiWindow_Body
data.value: {0} is deferred until FreeX has multi-window workbook hosting. It is tracked as a documented parity gap, not a silent partial implementation.

data.name: DeferredCommand_OfficeAddIns_Body
data.value: Office add-ins are excluded from FreeX. Add-in package metadata may be detected and retained, but add-ins are not installed, loaded, or executed.

data.name: DeferredCommand_OnlineTemplates_Body
data.value: Online template discovery depends on an external Microsoft template service and is excluded from FreeX. Create a blank workbook or open a local template file instead.

data.name: DeferredCommand_PivotTable_Body
data.value: FreeX loads and saves PivotTable and pivot caches metadata, including external/OLAP cache source metadata, creates and refreshes worksheet-range PivotTables from same-sheet or cross-sheet sources, supports Field List layout editing, GETPIVOTDATA, PivotChart field-button filtering and chart-type changes, Insert Slicer/Timeline authoring, slicer/timeline filtering, and preserves native PivotTable package parts where possible. Exact full-gallery PivotStyle theme semantics, full PivotChart Tools layout/design editing, and external/OLAP/data-model refresh or execution remain partial or excluded.

data.name: DeferredCommand_QuickAccessToolbar_Body
data.value: Quick Access Toolbar customization is not persisted in FreeX yet, so there is no custom toolbar state to reset.

data.name: DeferredCommand_RibbonCustomization_Body
data.value: Custom ribbon import/export is not implemented in FreeX. Custom Ribbon UI package parts are retained as unsupported XLSX metadata where safe, but FreeX does not run or edit them.

data.name: DeferredCommand_TrustCenter_Body
data.value: Trust Center policy settings are informational in FreeX because FreeX does not execute VBA macros, Office add-ins, ActiveX controls, Power Query, or external data-model refresh.

data.name: DeferredCommand_UnsupportedXlsxFeature_DigitalSignatureWarningSuffix
data.value: Digital signatures may no longer validate after workbook edits.

data.name: DeferredCommand_UnsupportedXlsxFeatureOpenWarning_Body
data.value: FreeX opened this workbook, but it contains unsupported or excluded XLSX features: {0}. These features are retained as opaque package parts where safe, but will not be executed, refreshed, rendered, or edited by FreeX.{1}

data.name: DeferredCommand_UnsupportedXlsxFeatureSaveWarning_Body
data.value:
This workbook contains features FreeX retains as opaque package parts, but does not run, render, author, or deeply edit: {0}.{1}
Continue saving?

data.name: DeferredCommand_WorkbookTheme_Body
data.value: {0} is deferred until FreeX has a workbook theme model. It is tracked as a documented parity gap, not a silent partial implementation.

data.name: Startup_CrashReportsConsentPrompt
data.value:
FreeX can send crash reports to help stabilize tester builds. Reports include app version, runtime, operating system, session ID, exception message, and stack trace. Workbook contents, formulas, filenames, and paths are not collected intentionally, but exception details can occasionally include sensitive values.
Send crash reports for this tester build?

data.name: UnsupportedXlsxFeatureKind_UnsupportedSheetTypes
data.value: chart sheets / dialog sheets / macro sheets

data.name: MainWindow_AutomationHelpText_AddANewSheetToTheWorkbook
data.value: Add a new sheet to the workbook.

data.name: MainWindow_AutomationHelpText_ApplyArialAsTheHeadingAndBodyThemeFont
data.value: Apply Arial as the heading and body theme font.

data.name: MainWindow_AutomationHelpText_ApplyTheFreeXColorfulThemeColorPalette
data.value: Apply the FreeX Colorful theme color palette.

data.name: MainWindow_AutomationHelpText_ApplyTheFreeXColorfulWorkbookTheme
data.value: Apply the FreeX Colorful workbook theme.

data.name: MainWindow_AutomationHelpText_ApplyTheGrayscaleThemeColorPalette
data.value: Apply the Grayscale theme color palette.

data.name: MainWindow_AutomationHelpText_ApplyTheOfficeThemeColorPalette
data.value: Apply the Office theme color palette.

data.name: MainWindow_AutomationHelpText_ApplyTimesNewRomanAsTheHeadingAndBodyThemeFont
data.value: Apply Times New Roman as the heading and body theme font.

data.name: MainWindow_AutomationHelpText_EditTheActiveCellValueOrFormula
data.value: Edit the active cell value or formula

data.name: MainWindow_AutomationHelpText_ExpandOrCollapseTheFormulaBar
data.value: Expand or collapse the formula bar

data.name: MainWindow_AutomationHelpText_FindMergedCellsBlankTableHeadersObjectsMissingAlternateTextAndChartsWith_AD813E90
data.value: Find merged cells, blank table headers, objects missing alternate text, and charts without titles.

data.name: MainWindow_AutomationHelpText_GoToACellOrNamedRange
data.value: Go to a cell or named range

data.name: MainWindow_AutomationHelpText_OnlineTemplateDiscoveryDependsOnAnExternalMicrosoftTemplateServiceAndIsE_D9AF02A3
data.value: Online template discovery depends on an external Microsoft template service and is excluded.

data.name: MainWindow_AutomationHelpText_OpenAPrefilledGitHubIssueWithSafeAppDiagnostics
data.value: Open a prefilled GitHub issue with safe app diagnostics.

data.name: MainWindow_AutomationHelpText_OpenCropControlsForTheSelectedOrMostRecentInsertedPicture
data.value: Open crop controls for the selected or most recent inserted picture.

data.name: MainWindow_AutomationHelpText_OpenFreeXSettingsAndFormulaErrorCheckingOptions
data.value: Open FreeX settings and formula error checking options.

data.name: MainWindow_AutomationHelpText_OpenLegalPrivacyAndThirdPartyNoticesPackagedWithFreeX
data.value: Open legal, privacy, and third-party notices packaged with FreeX.

data.name: MainWindow_AutomationHelpText_OpenGradientFillControlsForTheSelectedShape
data.value: Open gradient fill controls for the selected shape.

data.name: MainWindow_AutomationHelpText_OpenPrintPreviewWithWorksheetSettingsAndNativePrintAccess
data.value: Open print preview with worksheet settings and native print access.

data.name: MainWindow_AutomationHelpText_OpenTheCustomizeThemeDialogForColors
data.value: Open the Customize Theme dialog for colors.

data.name: MainWindow_AutomationHelpText_OpenTheCustomizeThemeDialogForEffects
data.value: Open the Customize Theme dialog for effects.

data.name: MainWindow_AutomationHelpText_OpenTheCustomizeThemeDialogForFonts
data.value: Open the Customize Theme dialog for fonts.

data.name: MainWindow_AutomationHelpText_OpenTheFillColorPickerForSelectedCells
data.value: Open the fill color picker for selected cells.

data.name: MainWindow_AutomationHelpText_OpenTheFontColorPickerForSelectedCells
data.value: Open the font color picker for selected cells.

data.name: MainWindow_AutomationHelpText_OpenTheFreeXHelpDocumentationInAWebBrowser
data.value: Open the FreeX help documentation in a web browser.

data.name: MainWindow_AutomationHelpText_OpenTheLatestFreeXTesterReleaseInAWebBrowser
data.value: Open the latest FreeX tester release in a web browser.

data.name: MainWindow_AutomationHelpText_OpenWorkbookThemeColorPresetsAndCustomization
data.value: Open workbook theme color presets and customization.

data.name: MainWindow_AutomationHelpText_OpenWorkbookThemeEffectPresetsAndCustomization
data.value: Open workbook theme effect presets and customization.

data.name: MainWindow_AutomationHelpText_OpenWorkbookThemeFontPresetsAndCustomization
data.value: Open workbook theme font presets and customization.

data.name: MainWindow_AutomationHelpText_OpenWorkbookThemePresetsAndCustomization
data.value: Open workbook theme presets and customization.

data.name: MainWindow_AutomationHelpText_SelectThisSheetRightClickOrPressShiftF10ForSheetTabOptions
data.value: Select this sheet. Right-click or press Shift+F10 for sheet tab options.

data.name: MainWindow_AutomationHelpText_ShowLocalAccountInformationForFreeX
data.value: Show local account information for FreeX.

data.name: MainWindow_AutomationHelpText_ShowsWorkbookOpenProgressAndBlocksWorkbookInteractionUntilLoadingFinishe_45BE9EDF
data.value: Shows workbook open progress and blocks workbook interaction until loading finishes or fails.

data.name: MainWindow_AutomationHelpText_ShowWorkbookCountsForSheetsCellsFormulasCommentsAndObjects
data.value: Show workbook counts for sheets, cells, formulas, comments, and objects.

data.name: MainWindow_AutomationHelpText_SpreadsheetGridUseArrowKeysToNavigateCellsF2ToEditAndTabEnterToMoveFocus
data.value: Spreadsheet grid. Use arrow keys to navigate cells, F2 to edit, and Tab/Enter to move focus.

data.name: MainWindow_AutomationHelpText_ToggleTheSelectedShapeShadowEffect
data.value: Toggle the selected shape shadow effect.

data.name: MainWindow_AutomationName_AddSelectedPivotTableFieldToColumns
data.value: Add selected PivotTable field to Columns

data.name: MainWindow_AutomationName_AddSelectedPivotTableFieldToFilters
data.value: Add selected PivotTable field to Filters

data.name: MainWindow_AutomationName_AddSelectedPivotTableFieldToRows
data.value: Add selected PivotTable field to Rows

data.name: MainWindow_AutomationName_AddSelectedPivotTableFieldToValues
data.value: Add selected PivotTable field to Values

data.name: MainWindow_Text_ChooseFieldsToAddToReport
data.value: Choose fields to add to report:

data.name: MainWindow_Text_ControlWhatTypesOfChangesOthersCanMake
data.value: Control what types of changes others can make.

data.name: MainWindow_Text_FindMergedCellsAndObjectsMissingAltText
data.value: Find merged cells and objects missing alt text.

data.name: MainWindow_Text_ReviewLocalFileStatusAndUnsupportedWorkbookFeatureWarnings
data.value: Review local file status and unsupported workbook feature warnings.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_3DMapToursAreDeferredInFreeX
data.value: 3D Map tours are deferred in FreeX.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_AddANewSheetToTheWorkbook
data.value: Add a new sheet to the workbook.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_AddAnotherPenToTheGalleryInkAuthoringIsDeferredInFreeX
data.value: Add another pen to the gallery. Ink authoring is deferred in FreeX.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_AddASimpleCellNoteToTheSelectedCell
data.value: Add a simple cell note to the selected cell.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_AddDeleteOrClearRangesThatRemainEditableWhenTheSheetIsProtected
data.value: Add, delete, or clear ranges that remain editable when the sheet is protected.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_AddOrEditAlternateTextForThePictureShapeOrTextBoxAnchoredAtTheSelectedCe_2199933B
data.value: Add or edit alternate text for the picture, shape, or text box anchored at the selected cell.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_AddOrEditAThreadedCommentOnTheSelectedCell
data.value: Add or edit a threaded comment on the selected cell.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_AddOrEditAThreadedCommentOnTheSelectedCellCtrlShiftF2
data.value: Add or edit a threaded comment on the selected cell (Ctrl+Shift+F2).

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_AddOrRemoveThisFieldFromTheActivePivotTableLayout
data.value: Add or remove this field from the active PivotTable layout.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_AddTheSelectedCellToTheWatchWindow
data.value: Add the selected cell to the Watch Window.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_AdvancedPivotTableOptionsAreEditedThroughSupportedPivotTableCommands
data.value: Advanced PivotTable options are edited through supported PivotTable commands.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_AlignTheContentsBetweenTheTopAndBottomOfTheCell
data.value: Align the contents between the top and bottom of the cell.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_AlignTheContentsToTheBottomOfTheCell
data.value: Align the contents to the bottom of the cell.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_AlignTheContentsToTheLeftEdgeOfTheCellCtrlL
data.value: Align the contents to the left edge of the cell (Ctrl+L).

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_AlignTheContentsToTheRightEdgeOfTheCellCtrlR
data.value: Align the contents to the right edge of the cell (Ctrl+R).

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_AlignTheContentsToTheTopOfTheCell
data.value: Align the contents to the top of the cell.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ApplyATwoColorGradientFillToTheSelectedShape
data.value: Apply a two-color gradient fill to the selected shape.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ApplyOrChangeBordersOnTheSelectedCells
data.value: Apply or change borders on the selected cells.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_AssignANameToACellOrRangeSoYouCanReferToItInFormulas
data.value: Assign a name to a cell or range so you can refer to it in formulas.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_AutomaticallyFillValuesFromExamplesInAdjacentColumns
data.value: Automatically fill values from examples in adjacent columns.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_AutomaticallyInsertASUMAVERAGECOUNTCOUNTAMAXOrMINFormula
data.value: Automatically insert a SUM, AVERAGE, COUNT, COUNTA, MAX, or MIN formula.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_BrowseAllAvailableFunctionsOrganizedByCategory
data.value: Browse all available functions organized by category.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_BrowseAndInsertDateAndTimeFunctionsLikeTODAYAndNOW
data.value: Browse and insert date and time functions like TODAY and NOW.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_BrowseAndInsertFinancialFunctionsLikePMTNPVAndIRR
data.value: Browse and insert financial functions like PMT, NPV, and IRR.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_BrowseAndInsertLogicalFunctionsLikeIFANDORAndNOT
data.value: Browse and insert logical functions like IF, AND, OR, and NOT.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_BrowseAndInsertLookupFunctionsLikeVLOOKUPHLOOKUPAndINDEX
data.value: Browse and insert lookup functions like VLOOKUP, HLOOKUP, and INDEX.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_BrowseAndInsertMathAndTrigonometryFunctions
data.value: Browse and insert math and trigonometry functions.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_BrowseAndInsertTextManipulationFunctionsLikeLEFTMIDAndTRIM
data.value: Browse and insert text manipulation functions like LEFT, MID, and TRIM.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_CenterTheContentsOfTheSelectedCellsCtrlE
data.value: Center the contents of the selected cells (Ctrl+E).

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ChangePivotChartStyleAndFieldButtonVisibility
data.value: Change PivotChart style and field button visibility.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ChangeRowHeightColumnWidthVisibilityOrCellProtection
data.value: Change row height, column width, visibility, or cell protection.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ChangeTheBoundPivotChartTypeWhilePreservingItsPivotTableConnection
data.value: Change the bound PivotChart type while preserving its PivotTable connection.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ChangeTheColorOfTheText
data.value: Change the color of the text.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ChangeTheCurrentChartDataRangeAndCategoryLabelColumn
data.value: Change the current chart data range and category-label column.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ChangeTheCurrentChartToAnotherSupportedChartType
data.value: Change the current chart to another supported chart type.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ChangeTheFillColorOfTheSelectedDrawingObject
data.value: Change the fill color of the selected drawing object.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ChangeTheFontOfTheSelectedCells
data.value: Change the font of the selected cells.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ChangeTheFontSizeOfTheSelectedCells
data.value: Change the font size of the selected cells.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ChangeTheOutlineColorOfTheSelectedDrawingObject
data.value: Change the outline color of the selected drawing object.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ChangeThePageOrientationToPortraitOrLandscape
data.value: Change the page orientation to Portrait or Landscape.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ChangeTheSourceRangeForTheSelectedPivotTable
data.value: Change the source range for the selected PivotTable.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ChangeTheWorkbookThemeColorPalette
data.value: Change the workbook theme color palette.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ChangeTheWorkbookThemeColorsAndFonts
data.value: Change the workbook theme colors and fonts.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ChangeTheWorkbookThemeEffectSetName
data.value: Change the workbook theme effect set name.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ChangeTheWorkbookThemeHeadingAndBodyFonts
data.value: Change the workbook theme heading and body fonts.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_CheckForCommonErrorsInTheFormulasOnThisSheetOrOpenErrorCheckingOptions
data.value: Check for common errors in the formulas on this sheet, or open error-checking options.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ChooseAnExcelStyleZoomPresetFrom10To400
data.value: Choose an Excel-style zoom preset from 10% to 400%.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ChooseAPaperSizeForThePrintedPage
data.value: Choose a paper size for the printed page.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ChooseASavedExcelChartStyleForTheCurrentChart
data.value: Choose a saved Excel chart style for the current chart.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ChooseHowToDisplayValuesInTheSelectedCells
data.value: Choose how to display values in the selected cells.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ChooseOrClearADisplayOnlyWorksheetBackgroundImage
data.value: Choose or clear a display-only worksheet background image.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ChooseTheCurrencyFormatForSelectedCells
data.value: Choose the currency format for selected cells.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ChooseWhetherFormulasAreRecalculatedAutomaticallyOrManually
data.value: Choose whether formulas are recalculated automatically or manually.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ClearingPivotTableFieldsFromTheRibbonIsDeferredInFreeX
data.value: Clearing PivotTable fields from the ribbon is deferred in FreeX.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ColorTheBackgroundOfTheSelectedCells
data.value: Color the background of the selected cells.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_CombineValuesFromMultipleRangesIntoASingleSummaryRange
data.value: Combine values from multiple ranges into a single summary range.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ContactSupportForFreeXInAppSupportIsNotYetImplemented
data.value: Contact support for FreeX. In-app support is not yet implemented.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ContinueAPatternIntoOneOrMoreAdjacentCells
data.value: Continue a pattern into one or more adjacent cells.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ControlWhatDataCanBeEnteredInTheSelectedCells
data.value: Control what data can be entered in the selected cells.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ConvertDrawnInkIntoAnOfficeShapeInkConversionIsNotYetImplementedInFreeX
data.value: Convert drawn ink into an Office shape. Ink conversion is not yet implemented in FreeX.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ConvertHandwrittenMathIntoTypedNotationInkConversionIsNotYetImplementedI_0362D0DF
data.value: Convert handwritten math into typed notation. Ink conversion is not yet implemented in FreeX.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_CopyFormattingFromOnePlaceAndApplyItToAnother
data.value: Copy formatting from one place and apply it to another.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_CopySafeAppVersionRuntimeOSAndSessionDiagnosticsForTesterReports
data.value: Copy safe app version, runtime, OS, and session diagnostics for tester reports.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_CopyTheSelectionAndPutItOnTheClipboardCtrlC
data.value: Copy the selection and put it on the Clipboard (Ctrl+C).

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_CreateADetailSheetForTheSelectedPivotTableValueCell
data.value: Create a detail sheet for the selected PivotTable value cell.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_CreateANewWorksheetWithForecastValuesFromATwoColumnTimelineAndValueRange
data.value: Create a new worksheet with forecast values from a two-column timeline and value range.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_CreateAPivotTableFromTheSelectedRange
data.value: Create a PivotTable from the selected range.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_CreateASlicerConnectedToTheSelectedPivotTableField
data.value: Create a slicer connected to the selected PivotTable field.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_CreateATableToManageAndAnalyzeRelatedData
data.value: Create a table to manage and analyze related data.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_CreateATimelineConnectedToTheSelectedPivotTableDateField
data.value: Create a timeline connected to the selected PivotTable date field.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_CreateNamedRangesFromLabelsInTheSelectedCells
data.value: Create named ranges from labels in the selected cells.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_CreateOrReplaceACalculatedFieldInTheSelectedPivotTable
data.value: Create or replace a calculated field in the selected PivotTable.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_CreateOrReplaceACalculatedItemInTheSelectedPivotTable
data.value: Create or replace a calculated item in the selected PivotTable.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_CropTheSelectedOrMostRecentPictureByPercentageFromEachEdge
data.value: Crop the selected or most recent picture by percentage from each edge.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_CutTheSelectionAndPutItOnTheClipboardCtrlX
data.value: Cut the selection and put it on the Clipboard (Ctrl+X).

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_CycleFillBorderTextColorAndFontSizeForTheFirstDataPointLabel
data.value: Cycle fill, border, text color, and font size for the first data point label.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_CycleTheCurrentChartAreaFillColor
data.value: Cycle the current chart area fill color.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_CycleTheCurrentChartDataLabelBorderColorAndWeight
data.value: Cycle the current chart data-label border color and weight.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_CycleTheCurrentChartDataLabelFillColor
data.value: Cycle the current chart data-label fill color.

data.value: Cycle the current doughnut chart hole size.

data.value: Cycle the exploded slice for pie and doughnut charts.

data.value: Cycle the first chart series fill or line color.

data.value: Cycle the first chart series outline or line width.

data.value: Cycle the first-slice angle for pie and doughnut charts.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_CycleTheMovingAverageTrendlinePeriodForTheCurrentChart
data.value: Cycle the moving-average trendline period for the current chart.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_CycleTheNumberFormatUsedByChartDataLabels
data.value: Cycle the number format used by chart data labels.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_CycleThePolynomialTrendlineOrderForTheCurrentChart
data.value: Cycle the polynomial trendline order for the current chart.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_CycleTheSeparatorUsedBetweenChartDataLabelFields
data.value: Cycle the separator used between chart data-label fields.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_CycleThroughCommonExcelDataLabelPositionsForTheCurrentChart
data.value: Cycle through common Excel data-label positions for the current chart.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_CycleWhichChartSeriesUsesTheSecondaryValueAxis
data.value: Cycle which chart series uses the secondary value axis.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_CycleWhichDataSeriesRendersAsTheComboChartLine
data.value: Cycle which data series renders as the combo chart line.

data.value: Cycle X axis gridline color and weight.

data.value: Cycle X axis gridlines between off, major, and major plus minor.

data.value: Cycle X axis label text color and font size.

data.value: Cycle X axis line color and weight on the current chart.

data.value: Cycle Y axis gridline color and weight.

data.value: Cycle Y axis label text color and font size.

data.value: Cycle Y axis line color and weight on the current chart.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_CycleYAxisTickMarkStyles
data.value: Cycle Y axis tick mark styles.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_DecreaseTheIndentLevelOfTheCellContents
data.value: Decrease the indent level of the cell contents.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_DeferredRequiresAMultiWindowWorkbookRegistry
data.value: Deferred: requires a multi-window workbook registry.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_DeferredRequiresMultipleLiveWindowsOverTheSameWorkbookSession
data.value: Deferred: requires multiple live windows over the same workbook session.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_DeferredRequiresMultiWindowWorkbookHostingAndSynchronizedScrollRouting
data.value: Deferred: requires multi-window workbook hosting and synchronized scroll routing.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_DeferredRequiresPairedWorkbookWindowsAndSideBySideLayoutState
data.value: Deferred: requires paired workbook windows and side-by-side layout state.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_DeferredRequiresPairedWorkbookWindowsWithSynchronizedViewportState
data.value: Deferred: requires paired workbook windows with synchronized viewport state.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_DeferredRetainedFromXLSXFilesAuthoringAndRenderingNeedADedicatedDataMode_568CFF74
data.value: Deferred: retained from XLSX files; authoring and rendering need a dedicated data model.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_DeleteCellsRowsColumnsOrTheActiveSheet
data.value: Delete cells, rows, columns, or the active sheet.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_DeleteDuplicateRowsFromTheSelectedRange
data.value: Delete duplicate rows from the selected range.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_DeleteEverythingInTheCellOrJustTheContentFormattingOrComments
data.value: Delete everything in the cell, or just the content, formatting, or comments.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_DisplayFormulasInAllCellsInsteadOfTheirCalculatedResults
data.value: Display formulas in all cells instead of their calculated results.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_DisplayValuesWithAThousandsSeparator
data.value: Display values with a thousands separator.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_DrawALineThroughTheMiddleOfTheSelectedText
data.value: Draw a line through the middle of the selected text.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_DrawInkWithTouchOrAPenInkAuthoringIsDeferredInFreeX
data.value: Draw ink with touch or a pen. Ink authoring is deferred in FreeX.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_DrawWithAPencilInkAuthoringIsDeferredInFreeX
data.value: Draw with a pencil. Ink authoring is deferred in FreeX.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_DrawWithAPenInkAuthoringIsDeferredInFreeX
data.value: Draw with a pen. Ink authoring is deferred in FreeX.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_EditChartTitleAndAxisTitleText
data.value: Edit chart title and axis-title text.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_EditPrintedPageHeadersAndFooters
data.value: Edit printed page headers and footers.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_EditTheSimpleCellNoteOnTheSelectedCell
data.value: Edit the simple cell note on the selected cell.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_EmbeddedObjectAuthoringIsDeferredInFreeX
data.value: Embedded object authoring is deferred in FreeX.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_EnableDropdownFiltersOnEachColumnToShowOnlyTheRowsYouWant
data.value: Enable dropdown filters on each column to show only the rows you want.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_EquationAuthoringIsDeferredInFreeX
data.value: Equation authoring is deferred in FreeX.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_EraseInkStrokesInkAuthoringIsDeferredInFreeX
data.value: Erase ink strokes. Ink authoring is deferred in FreeX.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ExpandOrCollapseTheFormulaBar
data.value: Expand or collapse the formula bar.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ExternalWorkbookQueriesAndConnectionManagementAreDeferredInFreeX
data.value: External workbook queries and connection management are deferred in FreeX.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_FilterAListUsingAnExcelStyleCriteriaRangeOptionallyCopyingMatchingRowsEl_51BAA76A
data.value: Filter a list using an Excel-style criteria range, optionally copying matching rows elsewhere.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_FindKnownMisspellingsInTextCellsOnTheActiveSheetWithReplaceReplaceAllAnd_D58B6767
data.value: Find known misspellings in text cells on the active sheet with replace, replace all, and ignore choices.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_FindMergedCellsBlankTableHeadersObjectsMissingAlternateTextAndChartsWith_4FECDB20
data.value: Find merged cells, blank table headers, objects missing alternate text, and charts without titles.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_FindReplaceOrGoToSpecificCellsInTheWorkbook
data.value: Find, replace, or go to specific cells in the workbook.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_FitTheSelectedCellsWithinTheVisibleGridViewport
data.value: Fit the selected cells within the visible grid viewport.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_GroupTheSelectedRowsOrWholeSelectedColumnsAltShiftRightArrow
data.value: Group the selected rows or whole selected columns (Alt+Shift+Right Arrow).

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_HideAllRowsInTheCurrentOutlineGroup
data.value: Hide all rows in the current outline group.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_HighlightCellsBasedOnTheirValuesUsingRulesColorScalesOrDataBars
data.value: Highlight cells based on their values using rules, color scales, or data bars.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_HighlightWithTranslucentInkInkAuthoringIsDeferredInFreeX
data.value: Highlight with translucent ink. Ink authoring is deferred in FreeX.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ImportDataFromALocalCSVFileDatabaseWebAndPowerQueryConnectorsAreExcluded
data.value: Import data from a local CSV file. Database, web, and Power Query connectors are excluded.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_IncreaseTheIndentLevelOfTheCellContents
data.value: Increase the indent level of the cell contents.

data.value: Insert a 100% stacked bar chart to compare percentage contributions by category.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_InsertA100StackedColumnChartToComparePercentageContributionsByCategory
data.value: Insert a 100% stacked column chart to compare percentage contributions by category.

data.value: Insert a 3D area chart to show trends with filled areas.

data.value: Insert a 3D clustered bar chart for the selected data.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_InsertA3DClusteredColumnChartForTheSelectedData
data.value: Insert a 3D clustered column chart for the selected data.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_InsertA3DLineChartToShowTrendsOverTime
data.value: Insert a 3D line chart to show trends over time.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_InsertA3DPieChartToShowProportionsOfAWhole
data.value: Insert a 3D pie chart to show proportions of a whole.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_InsertA3DSurfaceChartUsingTheSameMatrixRenderer
data.value: Insert a 3D surface chart using the same matrix renderer.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_InsertABoxAndWhiskerChartToSummarizeDistributions
data.value: Insert a box and whisker chart to summarize distributions.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_InsertABubbleChartToCompareXYAndSizeValues
data.value: Insert a bubble chart to compare X, Y, and size values.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_InsertAChartBoundToTheSelectedPivotTable
data.value: Insert a chart bound to the selected PivotTable.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_InsertAColumnChartToCompareValuesAcrossCategories
data.value: Insert a column chart to compare values across categories.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_InsertAColumnSparklineShowingRelativeValuesAsSmallBars
data.value: Insert a column sparkline showing relative values as small bars.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_InsertADefinedNameIntoTheFormulaYouAreCurrentlyEditing
data.value: Insert a defined name into the formula you are currently editing.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_InsertADoughnutChartToShowProportionsWithACenterHole
data.value: Insert a doughnut chart to show proportions with a center hole.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_InsertADrawingShapeOnTheSheet
data.value: Insert a drawing shape on the sheet.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_InsertAFunctionYouHaveUsedRecently
data.value: Insert a function you have used recently.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_InsertAFunnelChartToCompareStagedValues
data.value: Insert a funnel chart to compare staged values.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_InsertAHistogramChartToShowValueDistribution
data.value: Insert a histogram chart to show value distribution.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_InsertAHorizontalBarChartToCompareValuesAcrossCategories
data.value: Insert a horizontal bar chart to compare values across categories.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_InsertAHyperlinkToAWebPageFileOrLocationInTheWorkbook
data.value: Insert a hyperlink to a web page, file, or location in the workbook.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_InsertALineChartToShowTrendsOverTime
data.value: Insert a line chart to show trends over time.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_InsertALineSparklineATinyChartInASingleCellShowingATrend
data.value: Insert a line sparkline — a tiny chart in a single cell showing a trend.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_InsertAnAreaChartToShowTrendsWithFilledAreas
data.value: Insert an area chart to show trends with filled areas.

data.value: Insert a Pareto chart to rank values with a cumulative line.

data.value: Insert a picture from a local image file.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_InsertAPieChartToShowProportionsOfAWhole
data.value: Insert a pie chart to show proportions of a whole.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_InsertARadarChartToCompareMultipleValuesAcrossCategories
data.value: Insert a radar chart to compare multiple values across categories.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_InsertAScatterChartToCompareNumericXAndYValues
data.value: Insert a scatter chart to compare numeric X and Y values.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_InsertASpecialCharacterOrSymbolAtTheCursorPosition
data.value: Insert a special character or symbol at the cursor position.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_InsertAStackedBarChartToShowPartsOfAWholeByCategory
data.value: Insert a stacked bar chart to show parts of a whole by category.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_InsertAStackedColumnChartToShowPartsOfAWholeByCategory
data.value: Insert a stacked column chart to show parts of a whole by category.

data.value: Insert a stock chart from high-low-close or open-high-low-close data.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_InsertASunburstChartToCompareHierarchicalRings
data.value: Insert a sunburst chart to compare hierarchical rings.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_InsertASurfaceChartRenderedAsACategoryValueMatrix
data.value: Insert a surface chart rendered as a category-value matrix.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_InsertATextBoxYouCanPositionAndResizeAnywhereOnTheSheet
data.value: Insert a text box you can position and resize anywhere on the sheet.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_InsertATreemapChartToCompareHierarchicalProportions
data.value: Insert a treemap chart to compare hierarchical proportions.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_InsertAWaterfallChartToShowRunningValueChanges
data.value: Insert a waterfall chart to show running value changes.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_InsertAWinLossSparklineShowingPositiveAndNegativeResults
data.value: Insert a win/loss sparkline showing positive and negative results.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_InsertCellsRowsColumnsOrANewSheet
data.value: Insert cells, rows, columns, or a new sheet.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_InsertRemoveOrResetManualPageBreaksForPrinting
data.value: Insert, remove, or reset manual page breaks for printing.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_InsertSubtotalRowsForGroupedDataInTheSelectedRange
data.value: Insert subtotal rows for grouped data in the selected range.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_JoinTheSelectedCellsIntoOneLargerCellAndCenterTheContents
data.value: Join the selected cells into one larger cell and center the contents.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_KeepRowsOrColumnsVisibleWhileScrollingCreatingFrozenPanesClearsSplitPane_D77EB1E0
data.value: Keep rows or columns visible while scrolling; creating frozen panes clears split panes.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_LinkedGeographyDataTypesAreDeferredInFreeX
data.value: Linked geography data types are deferred in FreeX.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_LinkedStockDataTypesAreDeferredInFreeX
data.value: Linked stock data types are deferred in FreeX.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ListSheetObjectsAndControlVisibilityOrStackingOrder
data.value: List sheet objects and control visibility or stacking order.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_MakeAllContentVisibleWithinACellByDisplayingItOnMultipleLines
data.value: Make all content visible within a cell by displaying it on multiple lines.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_MicrosoftAccountIntegrationIsNotImplementedFreeXUsesLocalFilesAndLocalOp_EC989658
data.value: Microsoft account integration is not implemented; FreeX uses local files and local options.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_MoveTheCurrentChartToAnotherSheetOrANewChartSheet
data.value: Move the current chart to another sheet or a new chart sheet.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_MoveTheSelectedShapeOneStepCloserToTheBack
data.value: Move the selected shape one step closer to the back.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_MoveTheSelectedShapeOneStepCloserToTheFront
data.value: Move the selected shape one step closer to the front.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_MovingPivotTablesFromTheRibbonIsDeferredInFreeX
data.value: Moving PivotTables from the ribbon is deferred in FreeX.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_NavigateToTheNextSimpleCellNoteInTheSheet
data.value: Navigate to the next simple cell note in the sheet.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_NavigateToThePreviousSimpleCellNoteInTheSheet
data.value: Navigate to the previous simple cell note in the sheet.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_OfficeAddInDiscoveryIsDeferredInFreeX
data.value: Office add-in discovery is deferred in FreeX.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_OfficeAddInManagementIsDeferredInFreeX
data.value: Office add-in management is deferred in FreeX.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_OnlineTemplateDiscoveryDependsOnAnExternalMicrosoftTemplateServiceAndIsE_FB222BC1
data.value: Online template discovery depends on an external Microsoft template service and is excluded.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_OpenAListOfSimpleCellNotesOnTheActiveSheet
data.value: Open a list of simple cell notes on the active sheet.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_OpenAPrefilledGitHubIssueWithSafeAppDiagnostics
data.value: Open a prefilled GitHub issue with safe app diagnostics.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_OpenChartAreaPlotAreaAndLegendFormattingOptions
data.value: Open chart area, plot area, and legend formatting options.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_OpenExcelLikeErrorBarOptionsForTheCurrentChart
data.value: Open Excel-like error bar options for the current chart.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_OpenFreeXTrainingContentTrainingContentIsNotYetImplemented
data.value: Open FreeX training content. Training content is not yet implemented.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_OpenGoalSeekScenarioManagerOrDataTableTools
data.value: Open Goal Seek, Scenario Manager, or Data Table tools.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_OpenGroupingOptionsForTheSelectedPivotTableField
data.value: Open grouping options for the selected PivotTable field.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_OpenPivotTableLayoutAndStyleOptions
data.value: Open PivotTable layout and style options.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_OpenTheChartPickerAndChooseAChartForTheSelectedData
data.value: Open the chart picker and choose a chart for the selected data.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_OpenTheFreeXHelpDocumentationInAWebBrowser
data.value: Open the FreeX help documentation in a web browser.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_OpenTheLatestFreeXTesterReleaseInAWebBrowser
data.value: Open the latest FreeX tester release in a web browser.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_OpenThePrintPreviewAndNativePrintDialogForTheRenderedWorksheet
data.value: Open the print preview and native print dialog for the rendered worksheet.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_OpenValueFieldSettingsForTheSelectedPivotTableField
data.value: Open value field settings for the selected PivotTable field.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_PasteTheContentsOfTheClipboardCtrlV
data.value: Paste the contents of the Clipboard (Ctrl+V).

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_PinOrUnpinThisWorkbookInTheRecentFilesList
data.value: Pin or unpin this workbook in the recent files list.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_PivotTableSelectionShortcutsAreDeferredInFreeX
data.value: PivotTable selection shortcuts are deferred in FreeX.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_PlotAdditionalSeriesOnASecondaryValueAxisForTheCurrentColumnOrLineChart
data.value: Plot additional series on a secondary value axis for the current column or line chart.

data.value: Prevent structural changes to the workbook such as adding, deleting, or renaming sheets.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_PreviewRecommendedPivotTableLayoutsForTheSelectedRange
data.value: Preview recommended PivotTable layouts for the selected range.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_PrintRowAndColumnHeadingsOnEachPage
data.value: Print row and column headings on each page.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_PrintWorksheetGridlinesOnEachPage
data.value: Print worksheet gridlines on each page.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_QueuePivotTableFieldLayoutChangesUntilYouChooseUpdate
data.value: Queue PivotTable field layout changes until you choose Update.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_QuicklyFormatARangeAsAStyledTable
data.value: Quickly format a range as a styled table.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ReapplyTheLastFilterOrSortOperationToTheCurrentRange
data.value: Reapply the last filter or sort operation to the current range.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_RecalculateAllFormulasInAllOpenWorkbooksNow
data.value: Recalculate all formulas in all open workbooks now.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_RecalculateAllFormulasInTheActiveSheet
data.value: Recalculate all formulas in the active sheet.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_RecalculateFormulasAndRefreshFreeXManagedWorkbookDataExternalDataConnect_ECF2806B
data.value: Recalculate formulas and refresh FreeX-managed workbook data. External data connections and Power Query are excluded.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_RemoveAllActiveFiltersAndShowAllRowsInTheCurrentRange
data.value: Remove all active filters and show all rows in the current range.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_RemoveGroupingFromSelectedRowsOrWholeSelectedColumnsAltShiftLeftArrow
data.value: Remove grouping from selected rows or whole selected columns (Alt+Shift+Left Arrow).

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_RemoveGroupingFromTheSelectedPivotTableField
data.value: Remove grouping from the selected PivotTable field.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_RemoveTheSelectedCellFromTheWatchWindow
data.value: Remove the selected cell from the Watch Window.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_RemoveTheSimpleCellNoteFromTheSelectedCell
data.value: Remove the simple cell note from the selected cell.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_RemoveTheTracerArrowsAddedByTracePrecedentsOrTraceDependents
data.value: Remove the tracer arrows added by Trace Precedents or Trace Dependents.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_RemoveThisWorkbookFromThePinnedFilesList
data.value: Remove this workbook from the pinned files list.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_RenamingPivotTablesFromTheRibbonIsDeferredInFreeX
data.value: Renaming PivotTables from the ribbon is deferred in FreeX.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_RenderAdditionalColumnOrAreaChartSeriesAsLines
data.value: Render additional column or area chart series as lines.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_RepeatSelectedRowsOrColumnsOnEveryPrintedPage
data.value: Repeat selected rows or columns on every printed page.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ResizeTheSelectedOrMostRecentDrawingObject
data.value: Resize the selected or most recent drawing object.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_RotateTextDiagonallyOrVerticallyInACell
data.value: Rotate text diagonally or vertically in a cell.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_RotateTheSelectedOrMostRecentDrawingObject
data.value: Rotate the selected or most recent drawing object.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_SaveSheetsTheCurrentSelectionOrTheWorkbookAsAPDFFileOrAnXPSPackage
data.value: Save sheets, the current selection, or the workbook as a PDF file or an XPS package.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_SaveTheWorkbookIfNeededAndOpenWindowsShareForTheFile
data.value: Save the workbook if needed and open Windows Share for the file.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ScalePrintedOutputByPercentageOrFitItToAFixedPageCount
data.value: Scale printed output by percentage or fit it to a fixed page count.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ScrollTheSheetTabListToTheLeft
data.value: Scroll the sheet tab list to the left.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ScrollTheSheetTabListToTheRight
data.value: Scroll the sheet tab list to the right.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_SearchForAndInsertAFunctionIntoTheSelectedCell
data.value: Search for and insert a function into the selected cell.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_SelectInkStrokesWithAFreeformLassoInkAuthoringIsDeferredInFreeX
data.value: Select ink strokes with a freeform lasso. Ink authoring is deferred in FreeX.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_SelectTheMarginSizesForThePrintedPage
data.value: Select the margin sizes for the printed page.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_SetBubbleScaleNegativeBubbleVisibilityAndSizeRepresentation
data.value: Set bubble scale, negative bubble visibility, and size representation.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_SetFirstSliceAngleExplodedSliceAndDoughnutHoleSize
data.value: Set first slice angle, exploded slice, and doughnut hole size.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_SetGapWidthAndOverlapPercentageForBarAndColumnCharts
data.value: Set gap width and overlap percentage for bar and column charts.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_SetOrClearThePrintAreaForTheCurrentSheet
data.value: Set or clear the print area for the current sheet.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_SetSheetProtectionForLockedCellsWithAnOptionalPassword
data.value: Set sheet protection for locked cells with an optional password.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_SetUpDownBarColorsAndHighLowLineStyleForStockCharts
data.value: Set up/down bar colors and high-low line style for stock charts.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ShowAllRowsInTheCurrentOutlineGroup
data.value: Show all rows in the current outline group.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ShowArrowsPointingToTheCellsThatDependOnTheSelectedCell
data.value: Show arrows pointing to the cells that depend on the selected cell.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ShowArrowsPointingToTheCellsThatSupplyValuesToTheSelectedFormula
data.value: Show arrows pointing to the cells that supply values to the selected formula.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ShowManualPageBreaksAndPrintAreaBoundariesWhileEditing
data.value: Show manual page breaks and print area boundaries while editing.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ShowOrHideATrendlineOnTheCurrentColumnOrLineChart
data.value: Show or hide a trendline on the current column or line chart.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ShowOrHideBoxedCalloutStyleDataLabels
data.value: Show or hide boxed callout-style data labels.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ShowOrHideCategoryNamesInChartDataLabels
data.value: Show or hide category names in chart data labels.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ShowOrHideCellGridlinesOnTheWorksheet
data.value: Show or hide cell gridlines on the worksheet.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ShowOrHidePercentageValuesInPieAndDoughnutChartDataLabels
data.value: Show or hide percentage values in pie and doughnut chart data labels.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ShowOrHideRowAndColumnHeadings
data.value: Show or hide row and column headings.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ShowOrHideRowNumbersAndColumnLetters
data.value: Show or hide row numbers and column letters.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ShowOrHideRulersInPageLayoutView
data.value: Show or hide rulers in Page Layout view.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ShowOrHideSeriesNamesInChartDataLabels
data.value: Show or hide series names in chart data labels.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ShowOrHideTheFormulaBar
data.value: Show or hide the formula bar.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ShowOrHideThePivotTableFieldsTaskPane
data.value: Show or hide the PivotTable Fields task pane.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ShowOrHideTheTrendlineEquationOnTheCurrentChart
data.value: Show or hide the trendline equation on the current chart.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ShowOrHideTheTrendlineRSquaredValueOnTheCurrentChart
data.value: Show or hide the trendline R-squared value on the current chart.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ShowOrHideValueLabelsOnTheCurrentChart
data.value: Show or hide value labels on the current chart.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ShowOrHideXAxisLabelsOnTheCurrentChart
data.value: Show or hide X axis labels on the current chart.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ShowOrHideYAxisLabelsOnTheCurrentChart
data.value: Show or hide Y axis labels on the current chart.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ShowRecentFreeXUpdatesWhatSNewContentIsNotYetImplemented
data.value: Show recent FreeX updates. What's New content is not yet implemented.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ShowTheSelectedFormulaAndItsCurrentCalculatedResult
data.value: Show the selected formula and its current calculated result.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ShowTheSheetWithPrintLayoutBoundaries
data.value: Show the sheet with print layout boundaries.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ShowTheWorksheetInTheStandardEditingView
data.value: Show the worksheet in the standard editing view.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ShowWatchedCellsAndTheirCurrentValues
data.value: Show watched cells and their current values.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ShowWorkbookCountsForSheetsCellsFormulasCommentsAndObjects
data.value: Show workbook counts for sheets, cells, formulas, comments, and objects.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_SortAndFilterDataToFindTheInformationYouNeed
data.value: Sort and filter data to find the information you need.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_SortTheSelectedColumnFromLargestToSmallestZToA
data.value: Sort the selected column from largest to smallest (Z to A).

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_SortTheSelectedColumnFromSmallestToLargestAToZ
data.value: Sort the selected column from smallest to largest (A to Z).

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_SplitTextInOneColumnIntoMultipleColumnsUsingADelimiterSuchAsACommaOrSpac_EF92EDC9
data.value: Split text in one column into multiple columns using a delimiter such as a comma or space.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_SplitTheWorksheetAtTheSelectedCellOrRemoveTheCurrentSplitCreatingASplitC_2DAD6EB5
data.value: Split the worksheet at the selected cell, or remove the current split; creating a split clears frozen panes.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_StoreTheWorkbookWindowArrangementToUseWhenMultiWindowHostingIsAvailable
data.value: Store the workbook-window arrangement to use when multi-window hosting is available.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_SwitchTheCurrentChartTrendlineBetweenSupportedExcelLikeTrendlineTypes
data.value: Switch the current chart trendline between supported Excel-like trendline types.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ToggleAShadowEffectOnTheSelectedShape
data.value: Toggle a shadow effect on the selected shape.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ToggleAutomaticOrDataBasedXAxisBoundsForTheCurrentChart
data.value: Toggle automatic or data-based X axis bounds for the current chart.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ToggleAutomaticOrDataBasedYAxisBoundsForTheCurrentChart
data.value: Toggle automatic or data-based Y axis bounds for the current chart.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ToggleBandedColumnFormattingForTheSelectedPivotTable
data.value: Toggle banded column formatting for the selected PivotTable.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ToggleBandedRowFormattingForTheSelectedPivotTable
data.value: Toggle banded row formatting for the selected PivotTable.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ToggleBlankLinesAfterPivotTableItems
data.value: Toggle blank lines after PivotTable items.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ToggleColumnHeaderStylingForTheSelectedPivotTable
data.value: Toggle column header styling for the selected PivotTable.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ToggleLogarithmicScaleForTheCurrentChartXAxis
data.value: Toggle logarithmic scale for the current chart X axis.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ToggleLogarithmicScaleForTheCurrentChartYAxis
data.value: Toggle logarithmic scale for the current chart Y axis.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ToggleRowHeaderStylingForTheSelectedPivotTable
data.value: Toggle row header styling for the selected PivotTable.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ToggleWhetherTheLegendOverlaysThePlotArea
data.value: Toggle whether the legend overlays the plot area.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_VBAMacroRecordingAndPlaybackAreDeferredInFreeX
data.value: VBA macro recording and playback are deferred in FreeX.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ViewAddShowAndDeleteSavedWorkbookViews
data.value: View, add, show, and delete saved workbook views.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ViewCreateEditAndDeleteAllNamedRangesInTheWorkbook
data.value: View, create, edit, and delete all named ranges in the workbook.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ViewVersionAndLicenseInformationAboutFreeX
data.value: View version and license information about FreeX.

data.name: MainWindow_TooltipDescription_ViewLegalPrivacyAndThirdPartyNoticesPackagedWithFreeX
data.value: View legal, privacy, and third-party notices packaged with FreeX.
